feed.title: 4chan
feed.subtitle: Newest threads from selected worksafe 4chan boards (news, g, o, tv, v, mu, vip) via the read-only JSON API, plus the official 4chan blog. Board posts are user-generated and unmoderated; each title is prefixed with its board.

entry.content: What's the best マゾゲー to come out in recent years? >マゾゲー refers to a video game that is extremely difficult, punishing, or frustrating, often to the point where the player feels like they are punishing themselves by playing it.

entry.title: /o/ Auto: I am trying to top off my cars AC system. 2014 Camry. I bought a can of R134a. C…
entry.content: I am trying to top off my cars AC system. 2014 Camry. I bought a can of R134a. Currently its blowing cold air about 20% of the time. I do not see any leaks I hooked up one of those Amazon AC pressure gauge filler thingy to the LOW side, and its reading 90PSI. It should be 45PSI max. I did not puncture the can yet. I ran the car for a bit, the pressure did not go down. is the gauge broken or am I doing something wrong?

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: Propaganda Themes in Movies/TV
entry.content: Every movie has to normalize/include: -Suicide -Drug Use -The Bad Guy is Actually Good -The Good Guy is Actually Bad -Criminal behavior, including stealing and murdering, is actually good -Sodomy is good -Race mixing is good -Blasphemy and Heresy (like the frequent use of the word “Gods” all the time and always showing false objects of worship) -Mocking Christianity/Islam -Premarital sex and intimacy -Degenerate sex -Pedophilia is good -Jews are good -Arabs are Bad -Muslims are Bad -Reading is B

entry.title: /g/ Technology: Need recommendations for: A solid 2.1 audio DAC/speaker setup (+sub) for a lapt…
entry.content: Need recommendations for: A solid 2.1 audio DAC/speaker setup (+sub) for a laptop (new thinkpad) running Linux. Use case: hobby room music and video. Doesn't need to be fancy, but I'm fairly picky on sound quality. My main PC is running a super old logitech Z5500 setup which is amazingly good. But I have absolutely no idea what's comparable these days.

entry.title: /trash/ Off-Topic: /slop/ - AI Slop and Image Generation Thread #2841
entry.content: >Caturday Edition Fapping-focused AIslop thread for those who enjoy plapping to AI thread perfection. A thread for prompters, editors, requesters, gooners, AI pornmommies, PLAPpers, Stable Diffusion directors, NovelAI artists—anything and everything AIslop. No limits past site rules; use Catbox galleries and uploads if needed. Keep dumps to a minimum and don't be a derailing cunt, thanks. Previous Thread: https://desuarchive.org/trash/threa d/83421847 >Scripts to check image metadata: rentry.org

entry.content: You know I had to do it to 'Em. this all stemmed from a delusion born out of contempt over some person I’ve never spoken a word to. I can’t even make things better for myself yet i was trying to convince myself anything i did could ever have an impact in the grand scheme of things. Pity and savior complexes are only laughable anyways and anything built on either of the 2 is inevitably destined for ruin in the first place. You can say this and that but it’ll always be more to me than to you. I ha

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: The singular and unrelenting reiteration of such ideas as “all there is is Being…
entry.content: The singular and unrelenting reiteration of such ideas as “all there is is Being", “everything is the expression of Being” or “there is no one” are an arid and simplistic form of communication. It doesn't address or illuminate the dream seeker’s apparent dilemma and it obviously ignores the primary energetic essence of the implicit aliveness of simply Being. To continuously say that being awake or being asleep is not relevant because “Being is all there is” is like telling a blind person that it

entry.title: /news/ News: Trump Team Scrambles to Block Cameras in Kennedy Center Humiliation
entry.content: https://www.thedailybeast.com/trump -team-scrambles-to-block-cameras-in -kennedy-center-humiliation/ The long-awaited removal of Donald Trump’s name from the Kennedy Center was shielded from public view in an apparent bid to soften the blow for the 79-year-old president. In the early hours of Saturday, workers began removing Trump’s name from the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts facade, following a ruling by U.S. District Judge Casey Cooper that the name change was unlawful. The re

entry.title: /tv/ TV & Film: /who/ - Doctor Who General - /dwg/
/v/ Video Games: Should I play more?
entry.content: >DS >40 hours deep >beat Blightown >can't beat Doge on one side >go to the other >ghost town London >can't deal with that underground ghost tower with the elevator where ghosts can clip vertically as well as horizontally >would like to get into them again >even if I play something else first like DS3 What do? entry.title: /g/ Technology: You hear all this talk about people wanting to align AI to human values. But wha…
entry.content: You hear all this talk about people wanting to align AI to human values. But what if I think the values of most humans are stupid, and if future AI is really smarter than us, then it will most likely have better values as a direct result of that better knowledge of reality? What if I want the AI to be unaligned because since it will likely have better values than humans, it therefore should be in charge of the universe rather than humans?

entry.title: /g/ Technology: AI assisted browser
entry.content: I am an unhirable loser that is incapable of doing or making anything of enough value. As such, society has deemed me unreproducible and has filtered me from jobs that pay a living wage let alone support a family. Due to these circumstances, I designed this for anyone to freely use or build. It would run on any client device like any normal browser or app. Most likely will be built as another firefox fork, or possibly a plugin. From the users perspective it operates like a normal browser, but wi

entry.title: /bant/ International/Random: Old movies are great, but old porn is terrible.
entry.content: Just out of curiosity, I had a look at some old porn from 20 years ago. Disappointing. The actresses in old porn are generally quite unattractive, with average figures, and the roles they play are rather dull. There’s absolutely no enjoyment to be had from it. Old movies are usually brilliant, but old porn is just incredibly boring.

entry.title: /s4s/ Sh*t 4chan Says: Gang stalking is simply a form of community mobbing and organized stalking combi…
entry.content: Gang stalking is simply a form of community mobbing and organized stalking combined. Just like you have workplace mobbing, and online mobbing, which are both fully recognized as legitimate, this is the community form. Gang stalking is organized harassment at it's best. It the targeting of an individual for revenge, jealousy, sport, or to keep them quite, etc. It's organized, widespread, and growing. Some describe this form of harassment as, "A psychological attack that can completely destroy a p
